SettingDescriptions.No clip shortcut key: Kitufe cha kubonyeza kuwasha na kuzima noclip
SettingDescriptions.Turn on no clip: Inazima utambuzi wa mgonganishi na kasi, inawasha usio na udhaifu na kuruka bila kikomo
SettingDescriptions.No clip movement speed: Kiasi cha kasi unachotaka mhusika wako asogelee wakati wa hakuna klip
